character.name: Anthropomorphic falcon creature, NO ARMS — wings fold tightly against body with tips crossing at lower back. Angular wedge-shaped body, streamlined pointed chest, sharp raptor silhouette. Prominent hooked yellow raptor beak curving downward (not a small triangle). Slitted predatory eyes with heavy dark brow ridge, focused alert expression. Head tilted slightly to the side, asymmetric confident perched pose. Cerulean blue (#3FADC9) feathers covering head, back, folded wings, tail. Amber orange (#F5A742) accents only on: crest feather, chest stripe, wing tip edges. White or cream (#F5EDE3) underbelly. Sharp yellow taloned feet, two legs planted firmly. Silhouette inspired by Staraptor, Talonflame, or Swellow — perched raptor energy, NOT penguin, NOT owl, NOT mascot with arms. Cozy indie pixel art style, Pokémon Gen 3 starter readability, Stardew Valley warmth. Limited palette ~10 colors, no anti-aliasing, crisp 1-bit outlines, black outline color, transparent background, front-facing, 48 pixel height.
